name: gt
description: Operate Gitee repositories, issues, pull requests, releases, notifications, and related resources through the gt CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Gitee through the gt CLI
interface.longDescription: Use GT to inspect repositories, manage issues and pull requests, work with releases, notifications, and other Gitee resources through a CLI-first workflow.
defaultPrompt: Inspect and operate Gitee repositories, issues, pull requests, releases, notifications, and related resources with GT.
